prds.description: Teal/amber color palette in styles.css, Geist fonts, 260px sidebar with grouped navigation, persistent header with CMD+K trigger, and responsive layout shell with Outlet.
In-memory demo store with React context, seed data generator (35 items, 4 suppliers, 3 locations, 70 movements, POs, requests), session reset, and demo banner with 'Create Account' CTA.
Marketing-quality landing page with Stackwise branding, 'Try Demo' button (amber), 'Sign In' button, feature highlights grid, and animated stock health visualization.
Supabase auth with email/password signup, login, logout, password reset, session management. Profiles table with auto-creation trigger. New users default to Requestor role.
Three roles (Admin, Inventory Manager, Requestor) stored in user_roles table with security definer function. Sidebar nav items, route guards, and UI elements conditionally rendered by role.
Real-time stock health summary with 4 metric cards (Total SKUs, In Stock, Low Stock, Out of Stock), needs-attention section, recent activity feed (last 20 movements), and quick search bar.

Item registry with name, SKU, barcode, category, tags, unit of measure, cost, price, location, status, custom fields. Data table with filters (category, supplier, status, location), sorting, and pagination.

prds.feature: Product Catalog — Detail View & Bulk Edit
prds.description: Side-sheet item detail with barcode display, movement history timeline, custom fields editor. Bulk select with floating action bar for multi-item updates to category, supplier, location, or status.
Full audit trail of inventory changes. Movement types: received, shipped, adjusted, transferred. Movement log table, manual entry form, per-item history. Auto-calculation of resulting quantities.
Supplier CRUD with contact info, payment terms, lead times, min order qty. Detail view showing linked items, order history, and performance indicators (avg lead time, fulfillment accuracy).
Create POs with supplier, line items, expected delivery. Auto-suggest low-stock items. Status workflow: draft → submitted → partially received → fully received / cancelled.
Receive shipment flow: mark items as partially or fully received, auto-create stock movements. Printable/downloadable PO summary.
Requestors submit requests for items with quantities and reason. Manager approval queue (approve, partial fulfill, decline). Auto-generate stock movements on approval. Status tracking for requestors.
Hierarchical location management (warehouse → zone → aisle → shelf → bin). Assign items to locations. Transfer stock between locations. Per-location inventory summary. Filter catalog by location.

All Supabase tables (items, categories, suppliers, locations, stock_movements, purchase_orders, PO line items, inventory_requests, request items, custom_field_definitions, user_roles, notifications) with foreign keys, indexes, and comprehensive RLS policies per role.

Bulk CSV import and export for items, suppliers, and movements. Barcode display on item detail pages with printable labels. Quick-entry mode: scan/type barcode to pull up item and log movement instantly.
CMD+K command palette for global search by item name, SKU, or barcode. Jump to any item, page, or action. Keyboard shortcuts for common operations (new item, new movement, etc.).

In-app notification center with bell icon and unread count. Auto-alerts for low stock, zero stock, PO reminders, overdue POs. Configurable preferences per user. Toast notifications for immediate feedback.
Analyze historical movement patterns to suggest optimized reorder thresholds/quantities as actionable cards. Demand forecasting dashboard with 30/60/90-day projected stock levels and threshold zones.

prds.feature: AI — Anomaly Detection & Natural Language Search
prds.description: Flag unusual stock movements (spikes, large adjustments) with contextual alerts. Natural language search parsing conversational queries like 'what's running low in electronics' into filtered results.

prds.feature: Empty States, Error States & Edge Cases
prds.description: Empty state illustrations and CTAs for every list view (no items, no suppliers, no movements, no requests, no POs). Error boundaries, retry buttons for failed async ops. Graceful handling of deleted references.
Category/tag management, custom field definitions, location hierarchy management, global reorder defaults, demo data reset. All admin-only access.
Invite users, view user list, assign and change roles (Admin, Inventory Manager, Requestor). Admin-only panel. Prevent self-demotion for last admin.

Stock overview dashboard with inventory value, counts by status, category breakdown charts. Movement trends (received vs issued over time). Turnover rate and reorder frequency analysis. Filterable by date, category, supplier, location.
Supplier performance dashboards (avg lead time, order accuracy). Cost analysis by supplier, category, and time period. All reports exportable as CSV.
Skeleton loaders for every data table, metric card, and detail view. Smooth page transitions. Button loading states for all async actions. Optimistic UI updates where applicable.
Collapsible sidebar to hamburger menu on mobile. Responsive data tables (card view on small screens). Touch-friendly action buttons. Bottom nav bar on mobile. All pages tested at 390px.
First-time user onboarding tooltips highlighting key features. Help documentation page with FAQ. Contextual help icons on complex forms. Demo mode walkthrough overlay.
